title: Missing test: TranscriptMiner TRANSCRIPT_MINED event emission
evidence: TranscriptMiner:362-365 emits TRANSCRIPT_MINED fire-and-forget when eventStore present and saved>0. No test exists in src/mining/__tests__/ covering this code path.
suggested_fix: Add test to src/mining/__tests__/TranscriptMiner.test.ts: construct TranscriptMiner with mock eventStore, run mine(), assert createEvent called with TRANSCRIPT_MINED.

title: Missing test: RECALL_MISS event emission on zero-result auto_recall
evidence: ContextToolModule:974-979 emits RECALL_MISS when filtered.length===0. No test covers this path.
suggested_fix: Add test to context_auto_recall handler: mock memoryManager.recall to return [], assert eventStore.createEvent called with RECALL_MISS type.

title: DreamingEngine module comment missing Claude CLI dependency note
evidence: DreamingEngine.ts module doc says 'Performs periodic LLM reasoning' but does not note that it requires Claude CLI (callClaude) and cannot fall back to Ollama. Plan outcome was 'DreamingEngine Claude dependency documented'.
suggested_fix: Add one JSDoc line to DreamingEngine.ts @module comment: '@requires Claude Code CLI — uses callClaude() directly; Ollama fallback not available for dreaming.'
